architectural_decisions.daily_challenge_exploit_fix: Use SQLAlchemy with_for_update() on user records combined with full completed status validation on all daily challenge cards.
architectural_decisions.arxix_hallucination_prevention: Strictly fetch paper details via export.arxiv.org API using extracted paper IDs and feed parsed title and abstract to Groq.
architectural_decisions.spaced_rep_reviews: Create a dedicated '/reviews' tab and '/api/reviews/queue' route that serves only cards due for review.
architectural_decisions.gamification_streak_store: Add user.streak_shield column and build purchase mechanisms spending XP directly.
